ValidationRule.description: Specific fields required when content item is ready to publish
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL( Status__c ,'Ready to Publish') && (ISBLANK(Content_Location__c) || ISBLANK(Content_Pillars__c) || ISBLANK(TEXT(Format__c)) || ISBLANK( Length__c ) || ISBLANK( Summary__c ) || ISBLANK(TEXT(Primary_Objective__c) )|| NOT(ISBLANK( Due_Date__c )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Provide all required information and clear due date field (if not blank)
